Month_Year: The month and year of the service desk audit.
Company_Name: The name of the company where the service desk audit was conducted.
Total_Requests: The total number of service desk requests received during the specified month and year.
Employee_Requests: The percentage of service desk requests that came from employees of the company during the specified month and year.
Customer_Requests: The percentage of service desk requests that came from customers of the company during the specified month and year.
